name: Newtrul: Freight Negotiation Agent

parameters.subject: =Freight Quote Request - {{ $json.shipmentId }}
parameters.text:
=Hi,

We have a shipment requiring transport:

Route: {{ $json.route.origin }} → {{ $json.route.destination }}
Distance: {{ $json.route.distance }} miles
Cargo: {{ $json.cargo.type }}, {{ $json.cargo.weight }} lbs
Equipment: {{ $json.requirements.equipment }}
Delivery: {{ $json.requirements.deliveryDate }}

We're looking for quotes around ${{ $json.negotiation.negotiatedRate }}.

Please confirm availability.

Thanks,
Newtrul Freight Team

description: Newtrul: Freight Negotiation Agent - Automates carrier outreach and price negotiation
